note: FACTUAL record of who curated each category's frozen holdout vs who authored the detection rule. This is the honest ground truth, NOT the role-registry placeholders. Most categories are single-author (the same meta-layer authored both the rule and the holdout), which is an explicit limitation: a passing gate proves internal consistency + paraphrase robustness, not INDEPENDENT validation. When a distinct curator supplies a holdout, flip independent->true here (and provision roles in seed/role-registry.json).

entries.note: demonstrates the independent path: a distinct curator curated the holdout
